title: Crispy Indian Basmati Rice Pilaf
description: This umami-rich and crisp Indian basmati rice pilaf features a savory tadka base, perfect for adding to meals throughout the day.

ingredients.name: Curry Leaves
ingredients.notes: a few fresh leaves, for garnish

instructions: Rinse the basmati rice under cold water and drain. In a medium saucepan, bring 2 cups of water to boil with 3/4 cup low-sodium chicken broth.
Add the rinsed rice into the pot along with 1 tablespoon garam masala powder. Simmer on low heat for about 15-20 minutes until all liquid is absorbed and rice is cooked.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat, add cumin seeds and fenugreek seeds. When they start to splutter, add the curry leaves.
Drain any excess water from the rice and transfer it into the hot skillet. Toss gently with the tadka mixture until well combined and evenly coated in spices.
Let the pilaf sit for a couple of minutes before serving warm.
